deal_hunter.label: Deal Hunter
deal_hunter.purpose: Curated creator job board with verified listings and web-hunted opportunities.
softCtas: If you want to compare this framework against real opportunities, Deal Hunter is a practical next step.
Deal Hunter is useful once you want to move from evaluating inbox deals to scanning active campaigns.
weakCtas: You can also compare live opportunities inside Deal Hunter.
It can help once you want a cleaner shortlist of active campaigns.
strongCtas: Open Deal Hunter and start filtering real brand opportunities that fit your niche, platform, and workload.
Use Deal Hunter to turn this evaluation framework into an actual shortlist of creator deals.

email_decoder.label: Email Decoder
email_decoder.purpose: Analyzes sponsorship emails, extracts deliverables, flags scams, and suggests next steps.
softCtas: If you want a second pass on a real sponsorship email, Email Decoder can help surface the offer, risks, and missing details.
Email Decoder is useful when the message sounds promising but the real ask is still buried in the email.
weakCtas: You can paste a real outreach email into Email Decoder for a quicker read.
It works well as a first-pass filter for unclear inbound offers.
strongCtas: Paste your next outreach email into Email Decoder and let it surface the offer, risks, and reply angle in seconds.
Use Email Decoder before you reply so you can see the real ask, hidden workload, and red flags more clearly.

brand_analyze.label: Brand Analyze
brand_analyze.purpose: Checks brand legitimacy, risk, campaign style, trust signals, and creator fit.
softCtas: If the brand still feels unclear, Brand Analyze can help you review legitimacy, campaign style, and risk before committing.
Brand Analyze is useful when you want a faster read on whether a brand looks credible enough for deeper negotiation.
weakCtas: You can also run the brand through Brand Analyze for a faster reputation check.
It is a practical next step when brand trust is still uncertain.
strongCtas: Run the brand through Brand Analyze before you say yes so you can check trust signals, risk, and campaign fit in one place.
Use Brand Analyze to verify whether this brand looks credible enough for a real creator partnership.
